# CAPI Tracker

> CAPI Tracker is software for agencies and operators who need isolated Meta Conversions API endpoints for multiple clients.

## Core capabilities

- Provision a separate Netlify serverless endpoint for each client.
- Keep Meta Dataset access tokens in server-side environment variables.
- Capture browser attribution and supported customer match fields.
- Deduplicate browser and server Lead and Schedule events with a shared event ID.
- Generate direct-install tracker tags and optional GoHighLevel webhook mappings.

## Canonical site

- [CAPI Tracker](https://capi-tracker.vercel.app/): Product overview and endpoint pricing.
- [Documentation](https://capi-tracker.vercel.app/docs): Installation, deduplication, matching, and testing guidance.
- [Privacy Policy](https://capi-tracker.vercel.app/privacy): Account, credential, event, and payment data handling.
- [Terms of Service](https://capi-tracker.vercel.app/terms): Authorized use and endpoint credit terms.
- [System Status](https://capi-tracker.vercel.app/status): Provisioner and checkout configuration status.
